description: List of recipients of charity (bread) along with the khuddām al-kanīs (the list begins with three parnasim). This list fills three pages of the bifolium. One page has a Hebrew poem, preceded by the glyph, possibly in the handwriting of Moshe b. Levi ha-Levi.
tags: glyph, communal, recipients, Moshe b. Levi, charity, poverty
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
